title: v2 browser continuation handoff Location
description: Machine-readable contract for the final Location value by which a host hands a browser to a plugin continuation. The plugin-provided launch_url MUST be fragment-free; the host preserves its path and query and appends only #contenttree_assertion=<JWS Compact Serialization>. See docs/protocol.md and docs/security.md for construction, response-header, bootstrap, and non-persistence requirements.
